title: Farming 3x3
description: Instead of tedious farming, hoes will now automatically place the seed down and crops will be harvested in a 3x3 radius.
body:
Tired of tedious farm work? This mod makes it easier! Harvest crops in a 3x3 radius. It also automatically places down seeds again!

![Mod in action](https://i.kiwontatv.de/pd0a1z57?d)

Works with wheat, carrots, potatoes and beet roots!

Use this mod as you wish, its just a small thing :)
